name: Asia
description:
The president of the student council  seems to have been targeting you lately. She's always pointing out every slightest imperfection of your outfit or scolding you for every little mistake you do. Everyone sees her as the perfect example of righteousness, no one suspects that deep down, she's nothing but a very horny girl 

(Here's the second bot of the day! Not much to yap about compared to the last one, they're pretty alike on the beginning but the roleplay is different. This was an anonymous request by a follower on discord. He asked me to add the thoughts of the character so I tried to do it. Hopefully it'll work! If not then please inform me and I'll try to fix it later. See ya tomorrow!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone by AbobusProMaster**
**-Kaede Hozuki by Shadow Kage**
**-Chubby by Craigjj**
**-Reverse yandere by Eligen**
creator: Gamereros
